title: Important Dates for LNMU UG Admission 2026-30 (Revised Schedule)

detail.title: Important Dates for LNMU UG Admission 2026-30 (Revised Schedule)
detail.short_info: LNMU UG Admission 2026-30 online form is open for BA, B.Sc, B.Com 1st Semester. Last date to apply is 09 June 2026. Check revised schedule, fee, documents, and apply online at lnmuadm.samarth.ac.in.

content.text: LNMU UG Admission 2026-30 is open. Online applications for BA, B.Sc, and B.Com 1st Semester (4-Year Honours Programme under CBCS) started on 25 May 2026. The last date to apply without late fee is 09 June 2026.

Lalit Narayan Mithila University (LNMU), Darbhanga has started the centralized online admission process for Undergraduate (UG) 4-Year Degree Programmes (Session 2026-30) in Arts, Science, and Commerce streams. Admission is purely merit-based on Class 12 marks.
Direct Official Notification for LNMU UG Admission 2026-30: Click Here

sections.heading: Important Dates for LNMU UG Admission 2026-30 (Revised Schedule)

rows: Last Date to Apply (without Late Fee)
Last Date for Updation of Admitted Students by Colleges

content.text: Apply Online → LNMU UG Admission Portal

Candidates must have passed Class 12 (Intermediate) from a recognized board. Subject-wise eligibility for Honours programmes will apply as per university rules. Reservation benefits as per Bihar Government norms.

items: Visit the official application portal lnmuadm.samarth.ac.in
Click on the Admission link for 2026-30 session
Register using valid mobile number and email
Fill personal, academic, and college/subject preference details
Submit and download the confirmation page

content.text: LNMU will release the 1st Selection List on 17 June 2026. Shortlisted candidates must report to their allotted college for Counseling-cum-Admission between 19 June to 02 July 2026 with all original documents.

seo_tags: Lalit Narayan Mithila University UG Admission 2026
